title: Ensure internet access is granted and managed through your VPC

input_row.title: Ensure internet access is granted and managed through your VPC
input_row.description: Default Internet Access from your fleet streaming instances should remain unchecked.
input_row.rationale: When Default Internet Access is enabled, AppStream 2.0 uses the internet gateway in the VPC public subnet to connect to the public internet. The streaming instances are then assigned public IP addresses that are directly accessible from the internet. Internet Access from fleet streaming instances should be controlled using a NAT gateway in the VPC. When Default Internet Access is not enabled, streaming instances are assigned a private IP address that are not directly accessible from the internet.
input_row.audit: Perform the following steps to view the Fleet settings in AppStream From the Console 1. Log in to the AppStream 2.0 console at https://console.aws.amazon.com/appstream2 2. In the left pane click on Fleets. 3. Select the link for the fleet name you wish to view. 4. On the Network details section confirm that Default Internet Access is set to Disabled. If Default internet access is not set to disabled refer to the remediation below.
input_row.remediation: Perform the following steps to view the Fleet settings in AppStream From the console 1. Log in to the AppStream 2.0 console at https://console.aws.amazon.com/appstream2 2. In the left pane click on Fleets. 3. Select the link for the fleet name you wish to edit. 4. Click Actions, Stop 5. Scroll to the Network details section and click Edit 6. Deselect Default Internet Access 7. Click Save changes

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** aws_appstream2_fleet_default_internet_access_disabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
To automate the audit of the AWS AppStream 2.0 fleets for ensuring that Default Internet Access is disabled, the following checks will be performed:

- Use the AWS AppStream 2.0 API to describe fleets: `boto3.client('appstream').describe_fleets(fleetNames=[<fleet_name>])`
- This API call retrieves configurations for the specified fleet, including the `VpcConfig` which contains the `DefaultInternetAccess` property.
- **Specific configuration property to validate:** Check that the `DefaultInternetAccess` field is set to `DISABLED`.
- **Pass/Fail criteria:** If `DefaultInternetAccess` is set to `DISABLED`, the control passes (compliant). If it is set to `ENABLED`, the control fails (non-compliant).

Example of checks:
```python
import boto3

appstream = boto3.client('appstream')

def check_default_internet_access(fleet_name):
    fleet_info = appstream.describe_fleets(fleetNames=[fleet_name])
    default_internet_access = fleet_info['fleets'][0]['vpcConfig']['defaultInternetAccess']
    return default_internet_access == 'DISABLED'
```

This approach ensures a consistent and automated verification of the compliance control across all relevant AppStream 2.0 fleets.
